name: pi-search-skill
description: DuckDuckGo search skill for pi - lightweight and fast
readme:
# pi-search-skill

🔍 DuckDuckGo search skill for [pi](https://pi.dev) - lightweight, fast, and Chinese-friendly.

## Features

- ✅ Better Chinese search results than ddgs
- ✅ Time-based filtering (day/week/month/year)
- ✅ Region support (cn-zh, us-en, etc.)
- ✅ Site-specific search
- ✅ Clean JSON output

## Prerequisites

```bash
pipx install ddgr
```

## Installation

### Via npm
```bash
pi install npm:pi-search-skill
```

## Usage

```bash
# Basic search
search "python tutorial" -n 5

# Chinese search
search "人工智能" -r cn-zh -n 5

# Recent news
search "AI news" -t w -n 10

# Site-specific
search "dotfiles" -w github.com -n 5
```
